description: AWS Organizations Consolidated Billing Detection — Identifies member accounts operating independently (consolidated_billing=false) while an aws_organization resource exists, missing volume discounts and cross-account RI/SP pooling.

cost.note: AWS Organizations consolidated billing provides: (1) volume pricing tiers applied to combined usage across all member accounts, (2) RI/SP coverage shared across accounts — unused reservations in one account cover on-demand in another. Savings scale with total spend and on-demand percentage.

severity_rules.name: accounts_not_consolidated
severity_rules.condition: aws_organization exists AND any aws_account has consolidated_billing == false
severity_rules.description: One or more AWS accounts are not enrolled in consolidated billing under the existing AWS Organization. Each account's RI/SP purchases benefit only that account, and volume usage tiers are computed per-account rather than in aggregate. Enabling consolidated billing pools all accounts' compute usage for volume discounts and allows unused RIs/SPs from any account to reduce on-demand charges in others.

savings_calculation_priority: 2. Use pricing_note dollar amount from cost_report.json summary
